description: Sanitized routing evals for keeping the Kast skill usable as the primary Kotlin navigation surface.

source.note: Regression guard for Kotlin file prompts loading a generic file reader instead of the Kast skill.

cases.prompt: Open app/src/main/kotlin/com/example/Widget.kt and summarize the declarations before editing it.

observedRoute.risk: A provider may treat an exact Kotlin path as a generic file-read request and bypass Kast.

cases.recoveryExpectation: If the backend is unavailable, report the concrete Kast setup or runtime recovery command before using a generic reader.
verificationEvidence: SKILL.md explicitly covers every .kt and .kts file.
symbol/scaffold and raw/file-outline are catalog methods exposed through kast agent tools.
cases.notes: This case protects the all-Kotlin-file trigger and the sole-navigation rule.

source.note: Regression guard for unknown symbol prompts falling back to workspace dumps or text search.

cases.prompt: Find where EventBean is declared and show the best candidate before deciding which file to inspect.

observedRoute.risk: The Kast skill may load but an agent may still choose raw workspace files or text search before symbol identity.

cases.recoveryExpectation: If symbol/query returns INDEX_UNAVAILABLE, run the emitted Kast recovery or warmup path and retry the symbol-first route.
verificationEvidence: kast_symbol_query is exposed in kast agent tools.
SKILL.md names symbol/query as the first unknown-symbol step.
cases.notes: This case makes unknown-symbol navigation measurable without relying on raw file enumeration.

source.note: Regression guard for usage and caller prompts being answered by textual call matching.

cases.prompt: Before changing process, find every usage and the incoming calls that reach it.

observedRoute.risk: The request may be answered through text matches instead of symbol identity and call hierarchy.

cases.recoveryExpectation: If the name is ambiguous, use symbol/discover or symbol/resolve filters before references and callers.
verificationEvidence: symbol/references and symbol/callers are catalog methods exposed as agent tools.
SKILL.md requires Kast for Kotlin usage sets and hierarchy.
cases.notes: This case protects relationship navigation through symbol calls instead of text.

source.note: Regression guard for database-backed impact questions leaking implementation storage details.

cases.prompt: Which public API declarations have the highest fan-in, and what would this change impact?

observedRoute.risk: An agent may bypass the public metrics surface and ask for internal database paths or manual SQL.

cases.recoveryExpectation: If metrics are unavailable, report METRICS_DB_UNAVAILABLE and run the documented Kast index/runtime recovery before using another source.
verificationEvidence: database/metrics is a catalog method exposed through kast_metrics.
SKILL.md lists database/metrics and kast inspect metrics as the public impact path.
cases.notes: This case verifies database access is public through Kast without exposing storage internals.

source.note: Regression guard for agents copying raw JSON-RPC snippets instead of using workflow commands.

cases.prompt: Create a repeatable evidence bundle for a rename and diagnostics pass.

observedRoute.risk: A host adapter may expose raw transport details while hiding high-level workflow commands.

cases.recoveryExpectation: If workflow help is unavailable, report active binary and skill incompatibility and require upgrade or reinstall.
verificationEvidence: SKILL.md requires kast agent workflow for repeated semantic sequences.
kast agent workflow --help is part of the skill first-move checks.
cases.notes: This case keeps high-level workflow functionality visible in the public API.

source.note: Regression guard for public docs or tool descriptions leaking implementation-specific routes.

cases.prompt: Document how an agent host should navigate Kotlin code with Kast without depending on implementation internals.

observedRoute.risk: Public guidance may expose generated protocol endpoints, LSP capability internals, daemon routing, or backend implementation classes.

cases.recoveryExpectation: If an adapter exposes only internal routes, prefer the canonical Kast skill and require adapter refresh rather than documenting the internals.
verificationEvidence: SKILL.md public surface section names only kast agent, kast agent tools, kast agent workflow, kast inspect metrics, catalog methods, and named tools.
Tool descriptions for symbol/query, symbol/callers, and database/metrics do not mention protocol endpoint paths or LSP capability internals.
cases.notes: This case protects the public API boundary while still exposing database, symbol, and workflow capabilities.
